Draw a Mermaid state diagram for a library book moving through available, reserved, checked out, overdue, and returned states.
input.assistantResponse:
```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Available
    Available --> Reserved: hold placed
    Reserved --> CheckedOut: collected
    Available --> CheckedOut: borrowed
    CheckedOut --> Overdue: due date passes
    CheckedOut --> Returned: returned on time
    Overdue --> Returned: returned late
    Returned --> Available: processed
```
